memoryArtifacts.headline: Family of William Lawrence and Katerin Beaumont in "The Thomas Book," page 398.
memoryArtifacts.description:
This source seems to be the origin of information for this family, at least in printed form.  
Lawrence Buckley Thomas, "The Thomas Book," (New York: Trow Print, 1896), 398.  This work distinguishes many different families.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Neville Beaumont於1532年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾達時，她的父親Sir Richard Beaumont Knight18歲，母親Katherine Gascoigne de Neville19歲。她於1559年11月25日與William Lawrence在英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1582年7月10日在英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Neville Beaumont于1532年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾達时，她的父亲Sir Richard Beaumont Knight18岁，母亲Katherine Gascoigne de Neville19岁。她于1559年11月25日与William Lawrence在英国賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1582年7月10日在英国賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a Norman baronial name from any of several places in Normandy called Néville or Neuville ‘new settlement’. It was used as a given name first in the 16th century, and with increasing regularity from the second half of the 19th to the 1930s; since then it has steadily declined in popularity.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Neville Beaumont was born in 1532, in Hunsdon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Beaumont Knight, was 18 and her mother, Katherine Gascoigne de Neville, was 19. She married William Lawrence on 25 November 1559, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 10 July 1582, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Neville Beaumont est née en 1532, à Hunsdon, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Beaumont Knight, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Katherine Gascoigne de Neville, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé William Lawrence le 25 novembre 1559, à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 juillet 1582, à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Neville Beaumont 1532 in Hunsdon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Beaumont Knight 18 und ihre Mutter Katherine Gascoigne de Neville 19. Sie hat am 25. November 1559 in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England William Lawrence geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Juli 1582 im Alter von 50 Jahren in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Neville Beaumont è nata il nel 1532 nel Hunsdon, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Richard Beaumont Knight, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Katherine Gascoigne de Neville, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato William Lawrence il 25 novembre 1559, nel St Albans, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 10 luglio 1582, nel St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Neville Beaumontが1532年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハンスドンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Beaumont Knightは18歳，母Katherine Gascoigne de Nevilleは19歳であった。1559年11月25日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスでWilliam Lawrenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1582年7月10日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Neville Beaumont(이)가 1532년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 헌즈던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Beaumont Knight(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Gascoigne de Neville(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1559년 11월 25일 영국 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 William Lawrence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1582년 7월 10일 영국 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Neville Beaumont nasceu em 1532, em Hunsdon, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Beaumont Knight, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Gascoigne de Neville, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com William Lawrence em 25 de novembro de 1559, em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de julho de 1582, em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Neville Beaumont родилась в 1532 г. в местности хунсдон, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Beaumont Knight было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Gascoigne de Neville, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Lawrence 25 ноября 1559 г. в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 10 июля 1582 г. в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Neville Beaumont nació en 1532, en Hunsdon, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Beaumont Knight, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Katherine Gascoigne de Neville, tenía 19 años. Se casó con William Lawrence el 25 de noviembre de 1559, en St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 10 de julio de 1582, en St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
